rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ALIZER BARTHOLOMEW TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Mo. To Compel Answers To Interrogatories, Requests For Admissions And Inspection Demands & Production Of Documents For Attorney'S Fees & Expenses; Points And Auth.
rulings.Rulings: Respondent's motion to compel answers to interrogatories, requests for admission and request for production of documents is ordered off calendar for failure to comply with California Rule of Court 313(b), (i), and (j). (610/BCHAN)
